name: Castle and Stronghold Construction
description: Any character may claim land or a city lot and build. Costed parts per the CONSTRUCTION plate: Gatehouse 4,500-9,000 with portcullis and drawbridge; great round towers to 30,000; wall sections 42,000 with gates; Barbette 1,000; Small Tower 4,500; Great Keep 10,000; Bastion 3,000; Curtain Wall 3,500 per 90'; Towers 5,000-40,000; Barbican 14,000-20,000; Building 2,500. Doors, stairs, and windows per the fitted-cost list (Wooden Door 10/15 … Stairs stone 90/140; shorten towers −10%/10', extend +20%/10'). Other works: Moat 2,000; Earth Works 1,000; Palisade 1,500; Wooden Building 500 as stone-equivalent; Light/Heavy Catapult 250/400; Cauldron & Oil 50; Ram 1,000; Siege Tower 2,000. Anything unlisted prices by nearest comparison. Builders file duplicate plans with the referee — surprises, intakings, and sieges can happen.
special_notes: hand-written plate values corroborated by pass-1 (adjudication log)
